title: Linociera sumatrana

benefits: Linociera sumatrana, also known as the Sumatran mahang, has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for various health benefits. intro: Linociera sumatrana, also known as Sumatran linociera, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Linociera sumatrana include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and other upper respiratory tract infections.
